## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.ai's content strategy process and potential improvements to the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current process involves manual steps for research, content creation, and client presentation, with potential for automation](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Client feedback highlights need for regular updates to content strategy due to evolving business landscapes](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Calibration of tone and style is crucial for meeting client expectations and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Opportunity to streamline workflow by integrating tools (Notion, Airtable, Atlas) into a unified system](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy Workflow

  - [Research process:](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [Uses AI-powered prompts for company research, customer quotes, and writer style analysis](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Manual curation of AI outputs to create presentable client artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Creation of voice and tone guidelines with examples (e.g., "Blue-collar directness")](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Content inventory and keyword analysis:](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Ingests client URLs and filters keywords to focus on evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Uses SEMrush data, removing brand mentions and homepage to isolate relevant pages](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Assignment generation:](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Editors manually review and approve content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Import approved assignments into Airtable for tracking (statuses: backlog, considering, approved to start, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Metadata tagging (topic clusters, group types, personas, industries) for strategy communication](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Client Feedback and Challenges

  - [Rapid (client) mentioned frequent business changes affecting content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Need for regular updates to company context, CTAs, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Importance of calibrating tone and style to match client's brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Client appreciation for comprehensive research and content strategy presentation](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### Potential Improvements

  - [Integration of Notion-based artifacts directly into GrowthX.ai's system](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Automation of manual processes (e.g., editor review of content opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Enhanced visualization of assignment data (relevant score, volume discrepancies)](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Streamlined calibration process for tone and style preferences](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Tool Integration

  - [Current use of multiple tools: Notion for strategy docs, Airtable for assignments, Atlas for client presentation](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Opportunity to create a unified system for a more seamless workflow and client experience](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore automation options for editor review process in content opportunity selection](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Investigate integration of Notion artifacts into GrowthX.ai's main system](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Develop a more robust calibration process for tone and style preferences](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Consider creating a unified tool that combines Notion, Airtable, and Atlas functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss further improvements and answer additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/B2zgFWhXorA7RnaSLbc-r1ufZPsxKrNt?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
